decisions.decision: Use Tailwind transition heights + JS click toggler for settings submenu
decisions.rationale: Offers smooth height expansion, easy rotating chevron support, and solid layout integration.

decisions.decision: Ensure submenu remains open/active dynamically based on path context on load
decisions.rationale: Prevents the submenu from collapsing when clicking options and navigating.

decisions.decision: Remove redundant tabs on the top right of settings pages
decisions.rationale: Cleans up UI clutter and aligns with direct sidebar navigation.

next_action: Run /gsd-spike --wrap-up to package findings into a persistent project skill, then /gsd-plan-phase to plan the real build.
context_notes: Both Spike 010 and Spike 011 have been successfully built, validated, and committed to git. We are ready to wrap up the spike findings.
